overview: Mehar Singla Courses is an online course platform for technical trainer Mehar Singla, featuring a public course catalog, student enrollment with progress tracking, an admin panel for course and revenue management, and Stripe checkout in Indian Rupees.
features: Course catalog with search and level filters
Course detail pages with instructor bios
Student dashboard with enrolled courses and progress tracking
Admin panel for course CRUD, thumbnail uploads, and revenue analytics
Stripe payment integration in Indian Rupees (INR)
